_comment: DJR participant page settings. Participant Pages is the main CMS workflow. Text fields are seeded from the live DJR page so editors can revise before publishing. Create/manage albums in /albums.html, then paste Supabase album UUIDs here.
name: David J. Richards

story.body: The images here show the full arc: practice in the studio, cold nights on the track, a long lens aimed at the next play, a family moment, a reflection in sunglasses, and the dream of seeing his own story treated like cinema.
story.title: Creativity. Passion. Memories.
story.quote: The dream. The hard work. The moment. The capture.
story.lead: Welcome to DJR Photography by David James Richards — a creative photography brand built to capture sports, portraits, events, nature, community, and unforgettable life moments.

featured.body: David does not just take pictures from the edge of the action. He studies the field, waits for the face, the posture, the light, and the split second where a person becomes the story.
featured.title: The Sideline Becomes the Studio

about.body:
DJR Photography is owned and founded by David James Richards, Owner and Lead Photographer. DJR Pictures is about telling stories through powerful photos, creative ideas, and professional memories.
The mission is simple: capture life’s moments, one picture at a time.
about.title: Not just a gallery. A point of view.

creative.body: The AI poster and press-pass portrait are not presented as documentary photography. They are part of the dream language around David's work: what it feels like when persistence, imagination, and a camera start opening doors.
creative.title: Based on a true story of perseverance and a camera.

cta.title: Help David keep building the story.
cta.sub: Book a session, invite him to cover a game or event, or follow along as DJR Photography grows from a dream into a body of work.

services.title: Photography With a Point of View

items.summary: I see the candid moments between family and friends, during special occasions.  Capturing the authentic Love when no one's looking.
items.serviceDescription:
I will be  a fly on the wall for your ceremony, cocktail hour, or when everyone is on the dancefloor.
Capturing special glances during toasts, and introductions or simply capturing the moment.
items.title: Capturing the moments
packageDetails: The Love Story - Engagement Beach photos, Rehersal
A digital gallery of everything, with albums for each step of the journey.
High Quality prints in various sizes, custom to your desires.

items.summary: Warm, honest images where connection matters more than posing.
items.serviceDescription: A people-first offering for family, friends, and everyday moments where the feeling matters more than a perfect pose.
items.title: Human Moments
packageDetails: A relaxed gallery focused on honest expression
Good fit for family moments, small gatherings, and personal stories

items.summary: Color, texture, reflection, and small visual surprises that make a scene feel personal.
items.serviceDescription: A detail-led gallery for color, texture, reflection, objects, and small visual surprises that give a scene personality.
items.title: Creative Details
packageDetails: A gallery shaped around color, texture, and atmosphere
Good fit for creative experiments, objects, and visual studies

items.summary: Sideline focus, game-day atmosphere, and the emotion around the play.
items.serviceDescription: A sports-focused offering for sideline energy, game-day atmosphere, and the split second where effort turns into a story.
items.title: Sports Energy
packageDetails: A gallery built around movement, emotion, and timing
Good fit for games, practices, teams, and athlete stories

items.summary: Self-portraits, reflections, and experiments with how a photographer sees himself.
items.serviceDescription: A reflective offering built around perspective: self-portraits, mirrors, experiments, and the way a photographer learns to see himself.
items.title: Point of View
packageDetails: A gallery shaped around identity, viewpoint, and experimentation
Good fit for personal projects, creative sessions, and story studies
